creator: iwtcex@gmail.com
text: Can't we just close this? The submitter has a history of posting dozens of poorly researched questions. They habitually ignore responses, they often post the same question multiple times even if it was already answered. See these endorsements: http://mail-index.netbsd.org/port-amd64/2020/04/13/msg003205.html, https://www.mail-archive.com/misc@openbsd.org/msg172550.html.
